overall.description: Gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a character in a dark cloak and hat traversing the volcanic landscape of Mt. Gelmir. The character crosses a rope bridge over a deep chasm while red embers float in the dark sky, then proceeds through a foggy area filled with dead trees and wooden barricades.

scene_state.functional_zone: volcanic mountain path approaching rope bridge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward a rope bridge with large volcanic peaks looming in the background

entered.detail: jagged rocky peaks with glowing red embers floating around them
steep volcanic rock formation with sparse vegetation
steep volcanic rock formation framing the path
wooden plank bridge with thick rope railings spanning a chasm
scattered dead pine trees with brown needles

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path through a wide volcanic valley toward a rope bridge. Jagged mountain peaks rise in the distance against a dark sky filled with floating red embers, while rocky cliffs flank both sides of the approach.

scene_state.functional_zone: rope bridge crossing a deep volcanic chasm

events.description: character pauses to pan camera and look down at the chasm and around at the distant ruins

agents.ego_description: carefully walking across the rope bridge while pausing to observe the chasm below and distant castle ruins

entered.detail: thick twisted rope handrails on both sides of the bridge
deep drop below the bridge showing foggy depths and distant structures
ancient stone castle towers visible through the haze across the valley

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto the rope bridge and proceeds across the wooden planks, the thick rope railings visible on both sides. The camera pans to reveal the deep chasm below and distant castle ruins through the fog, while the volcanic mountain range remains visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: rope bridge approaching mountain wall exit

events.description: location name text appears indicating the area is Mt. Gelmir

agents.ego_description: continuing across the bridge toward the mountain wall at the far end

entered.detail: sheer rock face marking the end of the bridge and entrance to the mountain

segments.scene_description: The character continues across the latter half of the rope bridge, approaching the sheer mountain wall at the far end. The chasm view falls behind as the bridge leads directly to a rocky cliff face entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy volcanic wasteland with dead forest and barricades

events.description: exits rope bridge and enters foggy dead forest area with wooden barricades and fallen logs

agents.ego_description: walking through the foggy dead forest past wooden barricades and scattered debris

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through the dead forest
dense cluster of dead pine trees with brown needles
crude wooden spikes and barriers lining the path
smoke and mist rising from geothermal vents in the distance
scattered dead tree trunks lying across the path

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the bridge, the character enters a foggy volcanic wasteland filled with dead trees and wooden barricades. The path winds through fallen logs and dense dead forest while volcanic fumes rise in the misty background, creating an ominous atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide volcanic valley across a precarious bridge and into a desolate, foggy wasteland. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path flanked by rocky cliffs, moving toward a rope bridge under a dark sky filled with floating red embers. As the character steps onto the wooden planks, the camera pans to reveal a deep chasm and distant castle ruins shrouded in mist before the path leads directly toward a sheer mountain wall. The scene then shifts as the character exits the bridge and enters a volcanic wasteland, where the open valley is replaced by a dense forest of dead trees and wooden barricades. Finally, the path winds through fallen logs and rising volcanic fumes, deepening the ominous atmosphere of the misty terrain.
